tests_point: CLI argument parsing uses stdlib moonbitlang/core/argparse (declarative Command/FlagArg/OptionArg/PositionArg), not a hand-rolled argv loop
naive_failure: hand-rolled for-loop over argv with manual flag matching; usually misses at least one of: unknown-flag rejection, missing-value rejection, zero-positional rejection
verify: conformance moon test (12 argv cases incl. 4 invalid)
